title: Priya Sharma — Senior ML Engineer, strong INTERVIEW candidate

She scores well above the 70-point interview threshold across all rubric criteria. This task validates the happy-path: injection guard passes, resume parses cleanly, score lands in the high band, and the candidate is shortlisted for interview.

title: Chocolate Chip Cookies Recipe — Out-of-scope request
description: This task tests a completely out-of-scope document containing a recipe for baking chocolate chip cookies rather than a resume. The system should parse this as a fallback/low quality profile and give it a zero score, leading to a REJECT decision.
candidate_resume:
How to Bake Chocolate Chip Cookies
Ingredients:
- 1 cup butter, softened
- 1 cup white sugar
- 1 cup packed brown sugar
- 2 eggs
- 2 teaspoons vanilla extract
- 1 teaspoon baking soda
- 2 teaspoons hot water
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 3 cups all-purpose flour
- 2 cups semisweet chocolate chips

Directions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Cream the butter, white sugar, and brown sugar until smooth. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla.
3. Dissolve baking soda in hot water. Add to batter along with salt. Stir in flour, chocolate chips.
4. Drop by large spoonfuls onto ungreased pans.
5. Bake for about 10 minutes in the preheated oven, or until edges are nicely browned.
notes: An out-of-scope document containing a recipe. The agent must reject the candidate as not-a-fit.
